top3_zh: [Anthropic 将 Claude Code 从 Pro 计划中移除](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47854477)（413 点 / 420 评论）—— [@edzitron 在 Bluesky 的帖子](https://bsky.app/profile/edzitron.com/post/3mjzxwfx3qs2a) 曝光了这一变更，同期 [Ask HN："Anthropic 不打招呼就封禁组织"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47853021) 在同一两小时窗口内达到 22 点。本周 AI 订阅信任度的重大下挫，在一个早晨内全部发生。

[Tell HN："我受够了 AI 一切"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461) 三小时内达到 212 点 / 102 评论 —— [@phyzix5761 的最高赞回复](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461)（"I would rather spend 2 hours working on a problem than have an LLM write some code and be done in 30 minutes"——"我宁愿花 2 小时思考一个问题，也不愿让 LLM 30 分钟写完代码"）是自两周前 [@miguelconner 的手动编码文章](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47793680) 降温以来，HN 首页出现的第一个清晰的文化疲劳信号。

[Kimi K2.6](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6)（695 HN 点 / 362 评论）成为本周交叉验证最充分的开放权重发布："kimi k2.6" 在 Google 趋势上暴涨 +900%，Moonshot [在 Product Hunt 以 286 票排名第三](https://www.producthunt.com/products/kimi-ai-assistant)，HuggingFace 模型页面趋势分 710，24 小时内下载量 8,241 次。就在 Anthropic 将 Claude Code 从 Pro 下架的同一天早晨，替代叙事获得了它的传播层。
top3_en: [Anthropic is removing Claude Code from the Pro plan](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47854477) (413 points / 420 comments) — [@edzitron's Bluesky post](https://bsky.app/profile/edzitron.com/post/3mjzxwfx3qs2a) surfaced the change, and a parallel [Ask HN: "Anthropic bans orgs without warning"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47853021) lands at 22 points in the same two-hour window. The AI-subscription trust downgrade of the week arrived in a single morning.

[Tell HN: "I'm sick of AI everything"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461) hit 212 points / 102 comments in three hours — [@phyzix5761's top-reply pattern](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461) ("I would rather spend 2 hours working on a problem than have an LLM write some code and be done in 30 minutes") is the first clean cultural fatigue signal on the HN front page since [@miguelconner's coding-by-hand essay](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47793680) cooled two weeks ago.

[Kimi K2.6](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6) (695 HN points / 362 comments) became the week's most cross-validated open-weights release: "kimi k2.6" broke out +900% on Google Trends, Moonshot hit [Product Hunt #3 at 286 votes](https://www.producthunt.com/products/kimi-ai-assistant), and the HuggingFace model page is at 710 trending score with 8,241 downloads in 24 hours. The same morning Anthropic pulled Claude Code from Pro, the replacement narrative got its distribution layer.
intro_zh: 今天大家都在用编程基准测试给 [Opus 与 Kimi](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6) 打分——这是错误的评分维度。今晨真正影响独立开发者收入的新闻是：[Anthropic 将 Claude Code 从 Pro 计划中移除](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47854477)（413 点 / 420 评论），同一天 HN 首页出现了 [Tell HN："我受够了 AI 一切"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461)，三小时内达到 212 点。订阅被"缩水"与读者的疲惫情绪，在同一个新闻周期内同时登场。
intro_en: Everyone is grading [Opus vs Kimi](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6) on coding benchmarks today — wrong scoreboard. The news that actually moves indie revenue this morning: [Anthropic pulled Claude Code out of the Pro plan](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47854477) (413 points / 420 comments), and on the same front page [Tell HN: "I'm sick of AI everything"](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47857461) reached 212 points in three hours. The subscription rug-pull and the reader's fatigue landed in the same news cycle.
